A participant survey further supports that our questions are realistic, useful, and aligned with everyday memory needs.

ru.title: Датасет для оценки долгосрочной памяти AI-ассистентов в эгоцентричном видео
ru.desc: В работе представлен датасет SuperMemory-VQA для оценки способности AI-ассистентов решать задачи долгосрочного запоминания на основе эгоцентричного видео, записанного очками с искусственным интеллектом. Датасет содержит 52.9 часов повседневной деятельности с синхронизированным видео, аудио, информацией о движениях глаз и данными SLAM, а также 4,853 проверенных вопросно-ответных пар, охватывающих память об объектах, локациях, намерениях и временных последовательностях. Тестирование ведущих LLM-моделей показало, что существующие системы значительно отстают в выполнении реальных задач памяти и склонны к галлюцинациям при недостаточности доказательств. Исследование демонстрирует необходимость разработки новых архитектур, которые могут надежно работать с долгосрочной памятью в контексте персональных цифровых ассистентов.

en.title: Empowering AI with Long-Term Memory for Real-World Tasks
en.desc: SuperMemory-VQA is a new dataset designed for evaluating AI assistants on long-term memory tasks using egocentric video recordings. It includes 52.9 hours of real-world activities captured with AI glasses, providing a rich source of data for understanding human memory needs. The dataset features 4,853 carefully annotated question-answer pairs that cover various aspects of memory, such as object recall and timeline reconstruction. Current AI systems struggle with these tasks, indicating a need for improved architectures that can reliably answer questions based on sufficient evidence.

zh.title: 超记忆视觉问答：提升AI助手的长期记忆能力
zh.desc: SuperMemory-VQA是一个以自我为中心的视觉问答数据集，旨在评估人工智能助手在长期记忆任务中的表现。该数据集通过AI眼镜记录的现实世界活动生成，包含52.9小时的日常活动视频和多种传感器数据。与现有数据集不同，SuperMemory-VQA关注的是实际的人类记忆需求，而不仅仅是短视频的动作识别。通过构建4853对问题和答案，数据集测试了AI助手在物体和位置记忆、意图回忆等方面的能力。

papers.title: Semi-Supervised Noise Adaptation: Transferring Knowledge from Noise Domain
papers.abstract: Abstract A novel semi-supervised learning approach uses synthetic noise domains as source domains to improve target domain generalization through a proposed noise adaptation framework.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Transfer learning aims to facilitate the learning of a target domain by transferring knowledge from a source domain. The source domain typically contains semantically meaningful samples (*e.g.*, images) to facilitate effective knowledge transfer. However, a recent study observes that the noise domain constructed from simple distributions (*e.g.*, Gaussian distributions) can serve as a surrogate source domain in the semi-supervised setting, where only a small proportion of target samples are labeled while most remain unlabeled. Based on this surprising observation, we formulate a novel problem termed *Semi-Supervised Noise Adaptation* (SSNA), which aims to leverage a synthetic noise domain to improve the generalization of the target domain. To address this problem, we first establish a generalization bound characterizing the effect of the noise domain on generalization, based on which we propose a Noise Adaptation Framework (NAF). Extensive experiments demonstrate that NAF effectively leverages the noise domain to tighten the generalization bound of the target domain, leading to improved performance. The codes are available at https://github.com/AIResearch-Group/SSNA.
affiliations: Guangdong Laboratory of Artificial Intelligence and Digital Economy (SZ)
Nanjing University of Posts and Telecommunications
Southern University of Science and Technology

ru.title: Шум как помощник: адаптация синтетических доменов для полуконтролируемого обучения
ru.desc: В этой работе предлагается новый подход к полуконтролируемому обучению, который использует синтетические шумовые домены в качестве исходных доменов для улучшения обобщения целевого домена. Авторы формулируют задачу полуконтролируемой адаптации к шуму (SSNA), где небольшая часть данных целевого домена размечена, а остальные остаются без разметки. Они предлагают фреймворк адаптации к шуму (NAF), основанный на теоретической границе обобщения, которая характеризует влияние шумового домена на качество модели. Экспериментальные результаты показывают, что предложенный подход эффективно использует синтетические шумовые домены для повышения производительности на целевом домене.

en.title: Harnessing Noise for Better Learning
en.desc: This paper introduces a new semi-supervised learning method that uses synthetic noise domains to enhance the generalization of target domains. The approach is based on the idea that noise domains, created from simple distributions like Gaussian, can effectively serve as source domains for transferring knowledge. The authors propose a framework called Noise Adaptation Framework (NAF) to tackle the newly defined problem of Semi-Supervised Noise Adaptation (SSNA). Experimental results show that NAF successfully utilizes the noise domain to improve the performance and generalization of models in target domains with limited labeled data.

zh.title: 利用噪声域提升半监督学习的泛化能力
zh.desc: 这篇论文提出了一种新颖的半监督学习方法，利用合成噪声域作为源域，以提高目标域的泛化能力。研究表明，简单分布（如高斯分布）构建的噪声域可以在半监督环境中作为替代源域，帮助学习目标域。我们定义了一个新问题，称为半监督噪声适应（SSNA），旨在利用合成噪声域来改善目标域的泛化效果。通过建立泛化界限并提出噪声适应框架（NAF），实验结果表明该框架有效提升了目标域的性能。

papers.title: Score-Control for Hallucination Reduction in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Abstract Variance-Guided Score Modulation reduces hallucinations in diffusion models by controlling score function smoothness through Jacobian modulation while maintaining image quality.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Diffusion models have emerged as the backbone of modern generative AI, powering advances in vision, language, audio and other modalities. Despite their success, they suffer from hallucinations, implausible samples that lie outside the support of true data distribution, which degrade reliability and trust. In this work, we first empirically confirm previously proposed hypothesis that score smoothness causes hallucinations in Image Generation diffusion models and provide a density-based perspective. We further formalize this notion by linking the hallucinations probability mass to lipschitz constant of the learned score function. Motivated by this, we introduce a Variance-Guided Score Modulation (VSM) strategy that controls the score Jacobian, in turn reducing score smoothness and better approximating the ground truth score that decreases hallucinations. Empirical results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach reduces hallucinations (up to ~25%) while maintaining high fidelity and diversity, providing a principled step toward more reliable diffusion-based image generation. We also propose two benchmark datasets with extreme semantic variation for systematic hallucination evaluation. Code and Datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/bhosalems/VSM.

ru.title: Контроль гладкости score функции против галлюцинаций в диффузионных моделях
ru.desc: В работе предлагается метод Variance-Guided Score Modulation (VSM) для уменьшения галлюцинаций в диффузионных моделях. Авторы устанавливают связь между гладкостью функции оценки (score function) и вероятностью возникновения артефактов, используя константу Липшица. Предложенный подход контролирует якобиан score функции через модуляцию дисперсии, что снижает гладкость и улучшает аппроксимацию истинной функции оценки. Экспериментальные результаты показывают, что VSM снижает галлюцинации на 25% при сохранении качества и разнообразия генерируемых изображений.

en.title: Reducing Hallucinations in Diffusion Models with Score Modulation
en.desc: This paper introduces Variance-Guided Score Modulation (VSM) to address hallucinations in diffusion models, which are generative models used in AI. Hallucinations refer to unrealistic outputs that do not represent real data, and the authors link these issues to the smoothness of the score function. By controlling the Jacobian of the score function, VSM reduces this smoothness, leading to a more accurate representation of the true data distribution. The results show a significant reduction in hallucinations while preserving the quality and diversity of generated images, marking a step forward in reliable image generation.

zh.title: 减少扩散模型幻觉的方差引导评分调制
zh.desc: 本论文提出了一种名为方差引导的评分调制（VSM）的方法，旨在减少扩散模型中的幻觉现象。研究表明，评分函数的平滑性与幻觉的发生有关，因此通过调节雅可比矩阵来控制评分的平滑性，可以更好地逼近真实评分。实验结果显示，该方法在合成和真实数据集上减少了幻觉现象，同时保持了图像的高保真度和多样性。我们还提出了两个具有极端语义变化的基准数据集，以便系统地评估幻觉现象。

papers.title: Token Budgets: An Empirical Catalog of 63 LLM-Agent Budget-Overrun Incidents, with an Affine-Typed Rust Mitigation as a Case Study
papers.abstract: Abstract  LLM-agent budget overruns are a documented production failure class: a single retry loop can spend thousands of dollars before an operator notices, and the in-process integrity properties that would prevent it (no aliasing, no double-spend, no use-after-delegation of a cost-bearing value) are enforced, if at all, by ad-hoc wrappers rather than by the type system. Our central contribution is empirical: a catalog of 63 confirmed production incidents from 21 orchestration frameworks (2023-2026), each backed by a quoted GitHub issue and, where reported, a dollar loss, organized into an eight-cluster failure taxonomy (inter-rater Cohen's kappa = 0.837, N = 113), plus 47 supplementary structural entries. As one mitigation evaluated against this taxonomy, we build token-budgets, an 1,180-line Rust crate (no unsafe) that operationalizes affine ownership so that cloning, double-spending, or using a budget after delegating it are compile errors rather than runtime hazards an operator must remember to avoid. The dollar cap is runtime arithmetic under an estimator assumption; the affine layer makes that arithmetic non-bypassable. On single-agent workloads a 4-line Python counter matches the crate at 0/30 overshoot, so the distinguishing value is non-bypassability under operator error in multi-agent delegation: the delegation-fanout race documented in 11 incidents is rejected by the borrow checker at compile time, while the same pattern under asyncio overshoots 30/30 and three disciplined alternatives overshoot 0/30. Across five runtimes, three providers, and a temperature-stratified live-API test (N = 160), the approach reports zero cap violations and zero false refusals, at operational parity with concurrent work. Static over-reservation is 4-6x (2.11x adaptive). Binary-level cap-soundness on the running binary is left open.

ru.title: Типобезопасный контроль бюджета LLM-агентов через аффинную логику
ru.desc: В статье описан каталог 63 реальных инцидентов в production из 21 фреймворков оркестрации LLM-агентов, где системы исчерпывали бюджеты запросов на тысячи долларов из-за отсутствия контроля расходов на уровне типов. Авторы предлагают решение в виде token-budgets — библиотеки на Rust, которая использует систему типов аффинной логики для превращения ошибок управления бюджетом (дублирование расходов, использование после делегирования) из runtime-проблем в ошибки компиляции. Подход демонстрирует нулевые нарушения бюджета и нулевые ложные отказы на тестах с пятью runtime, тремя провайдерами и 160 запросами к live API. Система работает благодаря тому, что borrow checker компилятора Rust предотвращает опасные паттерны параллельной делегации бюджета, которые в asyncio приводят к превышению лимита в 100% случаев.

en.title: Preventing Budget Overruns with Compile-Time Checks
en.desc: This paper addresses the issue of budget overruns in large language model (LLM) agents, which can lead to significant financial losses during production. The authors present a catalog of 63 production incidents from various orchestration frameworks, organized into a failure taxonomy to better understand these issues. They propose a solution called token-budgets, implemented in Rust, which enforces compile-time checks to prevent common errors like double-spending and improper delegation of budget. Their empirical results show that this approach effectively eliminates budget violations in multi-agent scenarios, outperforming existing methods and ensuring operational safety.

zh.title: 确保预算安全，避免超支！
zh.desc: 本文讨论了大规模语言模型（LLM）代理预算超支的问题，这是一种已记录的生产失败类型。研究提供了63个确认的生产事件案例，涵盖21个编排框架，并将其组织成八个失败类别。为了解决这一问题，作者提出了一种名为token-budgets的解决方案，通过在Rust中实现仿射所有权，确保在编译时捕获克隆、双重支出和委托后使用预算的错误。该方法在多代理委托场景中表现出色，避免了运行时错误，确保了预算的安全性。

papers.title: Training-Free Multi-Concept LoRA Composition with Prompt-Aware Weighting
papers.abstract: Abstract Multi-concept customization in text-to-image generation is improved through prompt-aware weighting strategies that reduce interference between learned visual concepts.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) successfully enables personalization in text-to-image generation by adapting pre-trained diffusion models to specific visual concepts and styles. However, extending such models to multi-concept customization remains challenging. Naively combining multiple LoRA weights or their outputs often leads to interference among concepts, resulting in degraded visual quality and reduced fidelity to the reference images of individual concepts. This paper proposes a simple yet effective approach for multi-concept customization by optimally combining the outputs of multiple LoRA modules. We leverage the relative importance of each concept during generation, as inferred from its corresponding prompt tokens and introduce two methods, W-Switch and W-Composite, that employ a prompt-aware importance weighting strategy in which each LoRA is weighted according to the semantic influence of its trigger words in the target prompt. In addition, we extend existing quantitative evaluation metrics by proposing a new image-based similarity evaluation framework that assesses image fidelity and identity preservation through comparisons between real-world reference images and automatically segmented concept regions from generated images. We evaluate our approach on the ComposLoRA testbed and demonstrate consistent improvements over existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual quality, identity preservation and compositionality. Qualitative evaluations, including a Large Language Model (LLM) based assessment and a user study, further validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods and align with the newly introduced quantitative image-based metrics. Our code is available at https://github.com/GeorgeTsoumplekas/Prompt-Aware-Multi-LoRA-Composition.
affiliations: Department of Networks and Digital Media, Kingston University London, UK

ru.title: Умное взвешивание LoRA для гармоничной генерации множественных концептов
ru.desc: В этой работе предложен метод для улучшения мультиконцептной персонализации в генерации изображений из текста с использованием нескольких LoRA модулей. Основная идея заключается в применении стратегии взвешивания, основанной на смысловой важности каждого концепта, определяемой из токенов подсказки, что уменьшает интерференцию между различными обученными визуальными концептами. Авторы предлагают два метода — W-Switch и W-Composite — которые присваивают каждому LoRA вес в соответствии с семантическим влиянием его триггерных слов в целевом промпте. Также введена новая система метрик оценки, основанная на сравнении сегментированных регионов изображений, которая подтверждает улучшение качества, сохранения идентичности и композиционности генерируемых изображений.

en.title: Enhancing Multi-Concept Customization in Text-to-Image Generation
en.desc: This paper addresses the challenge of customizing text-to-image generation with multiple visual concepts without causing interference between them. It introduces prompt-aware weighting strategies that optimize the combination of outputs from different Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules based on the importance of their corresponding prompt tokens. The proposed methods, W-Switch and W-Composite, effectively enhance visual quality and fidelity by considering the semantic influence of trigger words. Additionally, a new evaluation framework is introduced to assess image fidelity and identity preservation, demonstrating significant improvements over existing methods.

zh.title: 多概念定制的智能加权策略
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种改进的文本到图像生成的多概念定制方法，通过提示感知加权策略减少学习到的视觉概念之间的干扰。我们使用低秩适应（LoRA）技术，成功地将预训练的扩散模型适应于特定的视觉概念和风格。为了优化多个LoRA模块的输出组合，我们引入了W-Switch和W-Composite两种方法，根据提示词的语义影响为每个LoRA加权，从而提高生成图像的质量和保真度。实验结果表明，我们的方法在视觉质量、身份保留和组合性方面优于现有的最先进方法。

papers.title: Scalable Inference-Time Annealing with Surrogate Likelihood Estimators
papers.abstract: Abstract Scalable inference-time annealing method uses flow-based models with energy-based surrogates to efficiently sample Boltzmann distributions without costly divergence calculations.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct A long standing challenge in computational chemistry and biophysics is efficiently sampling the Boltzmann distribution of molecules. Advances in generative modeling have been proposed to address the limitations of conventional sampling techniques by eliminating the computational cost of simulation. A promising direction is iteratively finetuning diffusion models along a temperature ladder whereby training data is generated via importance sampling during inference-time annealing. Unfortunately, these methods require computing a divergence over the score field to estimate importance weights, rendering them intractable for larger systems. Here we present scalable inference-time annealing (SITA), which retrains flow-based models to generate samples at progressively lower temperatures using an energy-based model to facilitate fast surrogate likelihoods. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on both Alanine Dipeptide and Alanine Tripeptide while avoiding costly divergence terms. Our code is available at https://github.com/countrsignal/sita.git

ru.title: Масштабируемое сэмплирование Больцмана через потоковые модели с энергетическими суррогатами
ru.desc: В работе предложен метод SITA для эффективного сэмплирования распределения Больцмана молекул, который использует потоковые модели (flow-based models) с энергетическими суррогатами вместо дорогостоящих вычислений дивергенции. Авторы переобучают генеративные модели на последовательности понижающихся температур, используя важностное сэмплирование (importance sampling) во время инференса. Метод избегает необходимости вычисления дивергенции поля оценок, что делает его масштабируемым для больших систем. Подход достигает современных результатов на тестовых молекулах без использования затратных дивергентных членов в функции потерь.

en.title: Efficient Sampling of Molecular Distributions with SITA
en.desc: This paper introduces a new method called Scalable Inference-Time Annealing (SITA) that improves the sampling of Boltzmann distributions in computational chemistry and biophysics. SITA uses flow-based models combined with energy-based surrogates to generate samples efficiently without the need for expensive divergence calculations. The method iteratively fine-tunes diffusion models at different temperatures, allowing for effective importance sampling during the inference process. The authors demonstrate that SITA achieves state-of-the-art results on molecular systems while significantly reducing computational costs.

zh.title: 高效采样玻尔兹曼分布的新方法
zh.desc: 本文提出了一种可扩展的推理时间退火方法（SITA），旨在高效地从分子中采样玻尔兹曼分布。该方法利用基于流的模型和能量基的代理，避免了昂贵的散度计算。通过在温度梯度上逐步微调扩散模型，SITA能够在推理过程中生成重要性采样的数据。实验结果表明，该方法在Alanine Dipeptide和Alanine Tripeptide上表现出色，且避免了高昂的散度计算。

papers.title: Do Text Edits Generalize to Visual Generation? Benchmarking Cross-Modal Knowledge Editing in UMMs
papers.abstract: Abstract Research reveals significant disparities between text and image generation capabilities in multimodal models, with effective textual knowledge editing not transferring reliably to visual output, necessitating modality-aware editing approaches.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Unified multimodal models (UMMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for general-purpose multimodal intelligence. As they are deployed in real-world applications, effectively updating internal knowledge becomes critical. While knowledge editing has matured for text-only models, it remains unclear whether edits that successfully modify textual outputs also transfer to image generation in UMMs. To study this question, we introduce UniKE, the first benchmark for cross-modality knowledge editing in UMMs, comprising 2,971 edit subjects spanning attribute and relation edits. Using VQA-based visual verification, we reveal a striking modality gap: text-side efficacy can reach approximately 92%, whereas the best overall VQA accuracy under direct image generation is only 18.5%. We further propose Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing, which explicitly activates edited knowledge before generation and improves overall VQA accuracy for all evaluated model-editor pairs, with gains up to 18.6 percentage points. Mechanistic analysis shows that this gap is associated with partial alignment between edited textual representations and the conditioning pathways for visual generation, where edits sufficient for text outputs may remain too weak or misaligned to steer image synthesis. These findings show that textual knowledge edits do not guarantee reliable cross-modality transfer and motivate modality-aware editing methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/gxx27/UniKE.

ru.title: Редактирование знаний требует разных подходов для текста и изображений
ru.desc: В работе исследуется проблема редактирования знаний в мультимодальных моделях, которые могут генерировать как текст, так и изображения. Авторы обнаружили значительный разрыв между эффективностью редактирования текстовых выходов (92%) и визуальных выходов (18.5%), что означает, что изменения в текстовых представлениях не переносятся надёжно на генерацию изображений. Они предложили новый метод Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing, который явно активирует отредактированные знания перед генерацией и улучшает результаты на 18.6 процентных пункта. Анализ механизмов показал, что разрыв связан с неполным выравниванием отредактированных текстовых представлений с путями кондиционирования визуальной генерации.

en.title: Bridging the Gap: Effective Knowledge Editing in Multimodal Models
en.desc: This paper investigates the differences in how multimodal models generate text and images, highlighting that changes made to text do not effectively translate to image outputs. The authors introduce UniKE, a benchmark designed to evaluate cross-modality knowledge editing, revealing a significant performance gap between text and image generation. They propose a new method called Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing, which enhances the accuracy of image generation by ensuring that edited knowledge is activated before the generation process. The study concludes that effective editing in text does not guarantee similar results in image generation, emphasizing the need for editing techniques that consider the unique characteristics of each modality.

zh.title: 跨模态知识编辑的挑战与解决方案
zh.desc: 这篇论文研究了多模态模型在文本和图像生成能力上的显著差异。尽管文本知识编辑在文本模型中已经成熟，但这些编辑是否能有效转移到图像生成上仍不明确。研究引入了UniKE基准，探讨跨模态知识编辑的有效性，发现文本编辑的有效性高达92%，而图像生成的准确率仅为18.5%。论文还提出了增强推理的参数编辑方法，显著提高了图像生成的准确性，表明文本知识编辑并不保证在不同模态间的可靠转移。

papers.title: Functional Attention: From Pairwise Affinities to Functional Correspondences
papers.abstract: Abstract Functional Attention reinterprets attention as functional correspondence between adaptive bases, enabling compact and resolution-invariant operator learning for PDE solving and 3D segmentation.  Generated by Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct Learning mappings between infinite-dimensional function spaces, or operator learning, is essential for many machine learning applications. Although transformer-based operators are popular, they often rely on token-wise attention. These methods treat continuous fields as discrete tokens and usually ignore the global functional structure. We introduce Functional Attention, which reinterprets attention as a functional correspondence between adaptive bases. Inspired by geometric functional maps, our method replaces softmax affinities with structured linear operators. This yields a compact, generalizable, resolution-invariant representation that explicitly captures global dependencies. Experiments demonstrate that Functional Attention can match state-of-the-art performance in many operator learning tasks, including solving PDEs, 3D segmentation, and regression, while remaining robust to varying discretizations. Project page is available at https://github.com/xjffff/FUNCATTN.

ru.title: От дискретных токенов к глобальной функциональной структуре
ru.desc: В работе предложен новый подход Functional Attention, который переосмысляет механизм внимания как функциональное соответствие между адаптивными базисами. Вместо традиционного token-wise внимания с softmax аффинностями, метод использует структурированные линейные операторы, вдохновленные геометрическими функциональными картами. Такой подход обеспечивает компактное, инвариантное к разрешению представление, явно захватывающее глобальные зависимости в функциональных пространствах. Экспериментальные результаты показывают, что метод достигает современных показателей в задачах обучения операторов, включая решение УЧП, 3D сегментацию и регрессию, при этом оставаясь устойчивым к различным дискретизациям.

en.title: Revolutionizing Attention: From Tokens to Functions
en.desc: This paper presents Functional Attention, a new approach to attention mechanisms in machine learning that focuses on functional correspondence rather than token-wise attention. By treating attention as a relationship between adaptive bases, it allows for more compact and resolution-invariant learning of operators, which is crucial for tasks like solving partial differential equations (PDEs) and 3D segmentation. The method replaces traditional softmax affinities with structured linear operators, enabling it to capture global dependencies effectively. Experimental results show that Functional Attention achieves state-of-the-art performance across various operator learning tasks while maintaining robustness to different discretizations.

zh.title: 功能注意力：重塑算子学习的全局依赖
zh.desc: 功能注意力将注意力重新解释为自适应基之间的函数对应关系，从而实现紧凑且分辨率不变的算子学习，适用于偏微分方程求解和三维分割。该方法通过几何函数映射的启发，使用结构化线性算子替代了传统的softmax亲和度。功能注意力能够显式捕捉全局依赖关系，提供一种紧凑且可泛化的表示。实验表明，功能注意力在多个算子学习任务中表现出色，包括偏微分方程求解、三维分割和回归，同时对不同的离散化保持鲁棒性。
